title: begonia robusta var. glabriuscula
intro: Begonia robusta var. glabriuscula, also known as Begonia robusta or Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves of Begonia robusta var. glabriuscula have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments, and are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Begonia robusta var. glabriuscula is often used as a tea or infusion, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
